StopRule: Frozen pre-2021 same-side momentum exit-cooldown discovery. Every row must parse exactly and remain profitable. Center net must be no worse than control in both disjoint eras; continuous net >=control +1.5%; CAGR >=control +0.03 point; PF/recovery/return-DD no worse than control; DD no worse than control; trades >=97% of control. At least 2 of 3 enabled neighbors must be no worse in both eras, improve continuous net >=1%, CAGR >=control +0.01 point, retain 99% of PF/recovery/return-DD, have no worse DD, retain >=97% of control trades, and change behavior. No post-result rescue.
